title: Lead Instructional Designer at TeamLease Skills University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at TeamLease Skills University
jsonLd.description:
Join the TeamLease Skills University family as a Instructional Designer in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TeamLease Skills University:
TeamLease Skills University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TeamLease Skills University!
